problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
